prompt.title: Product Management Prompt
prompt.label: 🔥 The Full Prompt
prompt.heading: Website with Manageable Product List
prompt.text:
Build me a complete website for [YOUR BUSINESS NAME — e.g., "Chai Sutta" tea stall / "Sharma Store" / any shop].

This must be TWO separate files:
1. index.html — the website
2. products.json — the product data

=== PRODUCTS.JSON STRUCTURE ===
A simple list where each product has:
- "id": unique number (1, 2, 3...)
- "name": product name
- "description": 1-line description
- "price": number (in ₹)
- "image": image URL (hosted on imgbb.com — upload your product photos there, paste direct link)
- "emoji": one emoji representing the item (used as fallback if no image)
- "badge": optional text like "Bestseller", "New", "Combo" — or "" for no badge
- "visible": true or false (if false, product does NOT show on website but stays in the file)

Start with these products (REPLACE WITH YOUR OWN):
[List your products here with name, price, description, image URL]

=== INDEX.HTML REQUIREMENTS ===
The website must FETCH products.json and dynamically render all products where "visible" is true.
NO products should be hardcoded in the HTML.

Design direction:
- [YOUR STYLE — e.g., "Dark brown theme, chai tapri vibe" / "Clean white, modern shop" / "Colorful, playful"]
- Mobile-first, responsive
- Product grid with cards showing image/emoji, name, description, price, and badge
- Smooth hover animations on cards
- Include: Hero section, Product grid, About section, Contact section, Footer

Technical:
- Products loaded via: fetch('products.json')
- Filter: only show products where visible === true
- Single HTML file + separate products.json
- No frameworks, no backend

=== THE WHOLE POINT ===
A non-developer can manage products by editing products.json:
- CHANGE price/name → edit the value, save, refresh
- ADD product → copy any product block, paste below, change values
- DELETE product → remove the block from the list
- HIDE product → change "visible": true to "visible": false (stays in file, doesn't show on website)
- UNHIDE product → change "visible": false back to true

Output: Two files — index.html and products.json
prompt.tip: Brackets [ ] mein apna content daalo — business name, products, style. Jitna specific likhoge utni better website milegi.

rows.how: imgbb.com pe upload karo, link "image" mein paste karo. Save. Refresh.
Ek block copy → paste → values badlo. Save. Refresh. New product!
"visible": true → "visible": false. Product gayab — file mein safe.
Poora block select → delete → save. Gone.

steps.text: Prompt copy karo — Claude ya ChatGPT mein paste karo. Brackets mein apna content daalo.
Do files milegi — index.html (website) + products.json (list). Dono ek folder mein save karo.
Deploy karo — GitHub Pages ya Vercel pe upload. Website live.
Products manage karo — sirf products.json edit karo. Website update.

cta.title: Aur prompts chahiye?
cta.subtitle: Shopping website, portfolio, resume — sab free.
